global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with an app interface display and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting the PulsePlay app with a call to action to install.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: App interface display
elements.description: A rectangular area showing a simplified app interface with rounded corners, featuring placeholder shapes.

elements.label: Circular decorative shape
elements.description: A large circular shape in the app interface, adding a modern touch to the design.

elements.label: Square decorative shape
elements.description: A large square shape in the app interface, complementing the circular element.

elements.label: Arrow icon
elements.description: A right-facing arrow icon indicating navigation, positioned at the top right of the app interface.

elements.label: Small circle icon
elements.description: A small circular icon located in the app interface, serving as a decorative element.

elements.label: Small circle icon
elements.description: Another small circular icon in the app interface, similar to the previous one.

elements.label: Small circle icon
elements.description: A third small circular icon in the app interface, maintaining visual consistency.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Stream the hype Cancel anytime' positioned centrally within the ad.

elements.label: App name
elements.description: The name 'PulsePlay' displayed in large, bold text at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Install now' encouraging user action.

elements.label: User-generated content label
elements.description: Small text labeled 'UGC' positioned at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern flat with bold colors, PulsePlay, Stream the hype.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the app interface is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Stream the hype, Cancel anytime, PulsePlay, Install now, UGC
